question: Does the situation involve 'Punishment for attempting to commit offences punishable with imprisonment for life or other imprisonment.' as described under Section 62?

yes.name: Punishment for attempting to commit offences punishable with imprisonment for life or other imprisonment.

no.name: Punishment for attempting to commit offences punishable with imprisonment for life or other imprisonment.
no.note: Only one section in this group -- it applies regardless.

sections.name: Punishment for attempting to commit offences punishable with imprisonment for life or other imprisonment.
